resolved_this_pass.scope: Restricted-health pseudonymous subjects with no direct identifier columns.
Scope-specific granted, withdrawn, expired and pending consent states gate protected records.
Diagnostic-source, regimen, device, provider and intervention records use references and hashes rather than raw medical bodies.
Deduplicated queue stores claim hashes, pointers, risk classes and priority only.
Packet reports consent and record counts without raw medical values and requires professional decision.

next_open_loops.task: Generate a bounded hash/pointer claim queue manifest from the v14 safety categories without raw claim text.
Build synthetic end-to-end care coordination exercises covering consent withdrawal, diagnostic import, regimen review, device blocking and clinician packet generation.
Resume Cost profile schemas and synthetic order-to-billing workflow preserved from v13/v14.
Connect real health data or clinician review.
next_open_loops.blocker: Requires explicit consent, privacy/security approval, scoped credentials and professional participation.

truth_boundary: Local synthetic-fixture care coordination advanced. No real patient data, clinical validation, connected staging, device operation or production is claimed.
